name: comfydex
description: Connect Codex to ComfyUI workflow generation, queues, runs, outputs, and project indexes.

interface.longDescription: Comfydex helps Codex generate and inspect ComfyUI workflows, submit prompts, follow queue execution, collect run outputs, and maintain a local project index through a Python MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Submit a workflow and fetch outputs.
Generate a safe ComfyUI workflow from this request.
